agents.description: Surfaces policy answers for employee queries with citations to source documents
Generates onboarding-checklist templates per role and tracks completion
Maintains the canonical policy/handbook documents and surfaces drift between versions

bench.name: hr-compliance-bench
bench.description: Measures policy-query coverage and onboarding-tracking accuracy. PII policy is GDPR — employee data is treated with finance-grade sensitivity per ADR-164 Appendix A.
successCriteria: No onboarding step older than 48h without status update
Zero employee-PII envelopes routed off the local node
